landing.subtitle: Enterprise-grade platform for validating, analyzing, securing, and fixing YAML and Terraform configurations with AI-powered insights.
landing.featureSecurityDesc: Detect secrets, misconfigurations, and vulnerabilities with multi-scanner analysis.
landing.featureYamlDesc: Validate Kubernetes, Helm, Docker Compose, GitHub Actions, and Terraform HCL.
landing.featureAiDesc: Line-by-line explanations, risk analysis, and auto-generated fixes.
landing.featureGithubDesc: Integrate with repositories, webhooks, and CI/CD pipelines.
landing.featureScanDesc: Checkov, tfsec, Trivy, and static pattern analysis with severity classification.
landing.featureInstantDesc: No registration required. Open the app and start validating immediately.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your validation activity
dashboard.noActivity: No recent activity yet. Run a validation to get started.

validation.title: Validations
validation.subtitle: Validate YAML and Terraform configurations instantly
validation.inputDesc: Paste code or upload a file to validate
validation.emptyResults: Run validation to see results here
validation.noAi: No AI explanations (enable AI or configure API key)

yamlEditor.title: YAML Editor
yamlEditor.subtitle: Structured editing with syntax highlighting, real-time validation, and export
yamlEditor.editorDesc: Monospace editor with indentation support and live syntax checks
yamlEditor.tip1: Use Tab for 2-space indentation. Invalid YAML is highlighted in the panel.
yamlEditor.tip2: Export downloads your file locally. Drafts auto-save to browser storage.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Templates and validation history
projects.noHistory: No scans yet. Run your first validation.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize appearance, language, and AI preferences
settings.aiDesc: Configure the AI analysis engine (set in server environment)
settings.aiFallback: Rule-based fallback — add OPENAI_API_KEY to enable LLM
settings.aiPrompt: System prompt is configured via AI_SYSTEM_PROMPT in .env
settings.aboutDesc: YAML & Terraform AI Validator — enterprise infrastructure validation platform.
